items.title: At a crucial stage in the season, Man City take control of the title race over Arsenal
items.summary: Manchester City's 2-1 win over Arsenal becomes a huge confidence boost for Pep Guardiola's side in the Premier League title race.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Northants' Sales makes career-best against Middlesex
items.summary: James Sales and Liam Guthrie both post career bests with the bat to help tilt a close contest in Northamptonshire's favour against Middlesex.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
